title: CRE Workflow Simulation
description: Deterministic CRE simulation coverage. All workflow validation in this section must run via `cre workflow simulate` only.

tests.title: record-upload workflow simulation succeeds with deterministic encrypted payload fixture.
tests.description: This test ensures record-upload can execute in CRE simulation with fixed payload and deterministic runtime configuration. It catches runtime import/config regressions in the workflow package.
steps: Run cre workflow simulate record-upload with docs/fixtures/workflows/record-upload.json
tests.successCriteria: Simulation command exits with success and produces expected execution log structure.

tests.title: consultation-processing and data-aggregation workflows simulate successfully with fixed fixtures.
tests.description: This test validates two workflow paths with deterministic fixtures to catch runtime drift and broken imports across workflow modules. It ensures both workflows remain executable in local deterministic environments.
steps: Run cre workflow simulate consultation-processing with its fixture
Run cre workflow simulate data-aggregation with its fixture
tests.successCriteria: Both workflow simulations exit successfully and emit expected execution traces.

tests.title: payment-mint workflow simulation completes and output can be mapped to deterministic result artifact.
tests.description: This test verifies the payment-mint workflow simulation and checks that output is captured to a deterministic artifact path for history. It prevents silent run success without persisted evidence.
preconditions: ctest result writer script is configured
steps: Run cre workflow simulate payment-mint with fixture
Validate evidence file path is included in results metadata
tests.successCriteria: Simulation succeeds and evidence artifact is written and linkable from results.json.
